Class SingleLineComment

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.Comment
recoder.java.SingleLineComment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, SourceElement
public class SingleLineComment extends Comment
Any non-SingleLineComment is a multi line comment.
